checkpoint: ED2K link and file identity alignment
reference_scope: aMule ED2KLink; eMule ED2KLink; protocol-docs link grammar
target_behavior: File, server, serverlist, nodeslist, and search links are parsed. File links preserve MD4 root hashes, part hashes, AICH roots, inline sources, source user hashes, crypt options, UTF-8 and percent encoding. File names normalize path separators before output path selection. ED2K file sizes are bounded to the eMule/aMule 2^38 byte limit. Malformed hash, AICH, part-hash, port, size, and empty-name inputs are rejected predictably.
notes: Search links parse as metadata only. Normal download creation still accepts file links only; server, serverlist, nodeslist, and search behavior belongs to the server/search checkpoints and existing options.

reference_scope: aMule/eMule server.met, nodes.dat, part.met, known.met, known2.met, clients.met; MLDonkey state
target_behavior: server.met now preserves operational metadata tags into ServerState. nodes.dat parsing filters unusable contacts, prunes Kad1-only contacts, and applies the reference verified-contact fallback. Legacy part.met, known.met, known2.met, and clients.met are replaced by aria2-next control files, session state, SharedStore, and UploadQueue ownership.
notes: Legacy database import remains out of scope unless explicitly approved later.
